title: Net Neutrality
summary: Enshrine equal access to information and prohibit interference with internet traffic.

title: No Gag Orders on Warrants
summary: Prohibit secrecy orders that prevent targets of government warrants from discussing them.

title: Legislative Compensation
summary: Cap congressional pay at ten times the federal minimum wage.

title: Election Holidays
summary: Make all election days holidays and protect the right to vote from employer retaliation.

title: Right to Informed Legal Counsel
summary: Require that citizens consult an attorney before waiving the right to legal representation.

title: Limits on Pardons
summary: Prevent executives from pardoning themselves, their family, or their associates.

title: Digital Privacy and Self-Incrimination
summary: Extend Fifth Amendment protections to digital devices, biometrics, passwords, and encryption keys.

title: Algorithmic Redistricting
summary: Require all legislative district boundaries to be drawn by mathematical criteria with a mandatory compactness metric and partisan fairness test, eliminating human manipulation.

title: Fair Apportionment — Wyoming Rule
summary: Uncap the House of Representatives using the Wyoming Rule: one representative per smallest-state population unit.

title: Fair Apportionment — Proportional Representation
summary: Double the Wyoming Rule seat count, replace single-member districts with multi-member districts and ranked choice voting.

title: Term and Age Limits for Federal Office
summary: Set term limits for Congress and age limits for all federal elected officials and Supreme Court justices.

title: Congressional Equal Application
summary: Ban Congress from passing laws that exempt themselves, and guarantee the people and the states the right to enforce it.
